---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for mononet
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: []
---

## Feature Description

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
Describe the target users and how this feature would help them.

**How often would this feature be used?**
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Occasionally
- [ ] Rarely

## Implementation Details

**Proposed API/Interface (if applicable)**
```python
# Example of how you envision using this feature
new_feature.do_something()
```

**Breaking Changes**
- [ ] This feature would require breaking changes
- [ ] This feature is backward compatible

**Dependencies**
List any new dependencies this feature might require.

## Additional Context

**Related Issues/PRs**
Link any related issues or pull requests.

**External References**
Add links to any external documentation, similar implementations, or research.

**Mockups/Diagrams**
If applicable, add sketches, mockups, or diagrams to help explain your feature request.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the feature
- [ ] I have explained the use case and benefits
- [ ] I have considered backward compatibility
- [ ] I understand this is a request and may not be implemented
